Bounty Of One: Premium

You are a Wild West hero facing endless waves of bounty hunters in this roguelite bullet hell survivor. Your hero automatically shoots at the nearest enemy while you focus on dodging projectiles and avoiding collisions. Defeat enemies to collect experience orbs, level up, and choose powerful upgrades. Survive increasingly difficult waves, face bosses every 5 minutes, and see how long you can last before your health runs out!

Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move your hero in eight directions | Space: Dash forward to dodge through danger | Z: Use special ability (when unlocked via upgrades) | Enter: Start the game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Return to title screen from game over
